bio: Buddy aka Honey is one of the new colony dumped in October 2025. Unfortunately he had a nasty abscess on his cheek in February 2026. While being fostered to recover from his abscess his foster fell in love and arranged for all his vaccinations etc. however the resident cats didn’t feel the same way so he was released with his colony friends at the end of March. He would do well in a home so please consider adopting this handsome, energetic, loving boy.
location: Downstairs from Baker Street in Cluster Q
